claims.name: whole_shell_Kadm_below_allowed
claims.detail: (K_adm = 1+T'(shell) <= K_allowed(N) = 8+c_R sqrt(N) for every shell; min margin 10.63x)

claims.name: margin_grows_with_N
claims.detail: (the margin GROWS 10.6x -> 14.0x as N:168->2040, since T'~R^eps grows far slower than the allowed sqrt(N): the inequality is not borderline but widening)

claims.name: subpattern_Kadm_below_allowed
claims.detail: (for every tested sub-pattern Q' of a shell, 1+T'(Q') <= K_allowed(|Q'|); worst ratio 0.307 <= 1 -- since T'(Q') <= min(|Q'|, T'(shell)) and 8+c_R sqrt(n) dominates both branches)
